segments.text: Duck Hunt — in a spot like this, looking at how things stand...
segments.original_text: ダックハント こういうところで考えれば今のように

segments.text: Early forward smash from above on recovery!
segments.original_text: 早めに上から復帰横スマッシュ

full_text: Duck Hunt — in a spot like this, looking at how things stand... Early forward smash from above on recovery!
